posts.title: What Makes a Password Strong? A Simple Guide
posts.excerpt: Most people think a strong password needs lots of symbols. That's actually wrong. This plain-English guide explains what really makes a password safe.

posts.title: Why You Need a Different Password for Every Website
posts.excerpt: Using the same password everywhere is one of the most dangerous things you can do online. Here's why — and the simple fix.

posts.title: The Best Free Password Managers for Beginners (2026)
posts.excerpt: You can't remember a different strong password for every site — and you shouldn't have to. A password manager does it for you. Here are the best free options.
posts.author: Emma Watts, Digital Safety Writer

posts.title: How to Set Up Two-Factor Authentication — Simple Steps
posts.excerpt: Two-factor authentication makes your accounts much harder to break into — even if someone knows your password. Simple step-by-step guide.
posts.author: Emma Watts, Digital Safety Writer

posts.title: What to Do If You Think You've Been Hacked
posts.excerpt: Don't panic. Follow these steps in order. A calm, plain-English guide to recovering a hacked account.

posts.title: 7 Common Password Mistakes (And How to Fix Them)
posts.excerpt: Most people make at least one of these password mistakes without realising it. Here's how to spot them and fix them quickly.
